TRANSFORMFIELD.EXPRESSION: iif( not isnull (LKP_CustomerID) and (Is_Current =1) and ( (LKP_CompanyName <> CompanyName) or (LKP_ContactTitle <> ContactTitle) or (LKP_Address <>Address)or (LKP_City<>City)or(LKP_Region<>Region) or(LKP_Country<>Country)or(LKP_Phone<>Phone)or(LKP_Fax<>Fax)),1,0)
TRANSFORMFIELD.NAME: updateCondition
